title: Premium Foldable Clothes Drying Hanger with 24 Clips, Anti-Rusty Plastic Drying Rack for Socks, Lingeries, Delicates and Baby Clothes
features: PERFECT DESIGN Designed a convenient rotating neck, smooth swivel hook. The 360 rotatable laundry hanger can be rotated to any angle you want and it is easy to dry laundry from all directions. Hanger clips are perfectly spaced to efficiently maximize air flow. Our laundry hanger- Make your air drying easier!

SPACE SAVING FOYERNUAGE laundry hanger hang up to 24 small items in 1 compact space for multipurpose drying or storage. Collapses flat when not in use for easy storage, save 50% space. This foldable drying hanger is also lightweight and perfect for daily household use and trips.

MULTIPURPOSE Our dry rack for clothes is designed for both hand washing and machine washing items, fits for hanging towel, underwear, scarf, panties, bras, shirt, tie, hat, socks, masks, baby clothes, handkerchief or other clothes. Easy to hang it on closets, shower curtain rod, laundry room, outside clothesline etc.
International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
description: Product Description Windproof design Larger inside and small outside, not easy to blow off Rotating hook Even drying, 360 degree rotating hook easily for air drying Serrated clips Strong accessories Space saving There are up to 24 small items in 1 compact space for multipurpose drying or storage. Collapses flat when not in use for easy storage, save 50% space. This foldable drying hanger is also lightweight and perfect for daily household use and trips. Removable clips Convenient for storage Support up to 8KG weight The main body of our drying hanger is solid and strong, it can support up to 8KG weight
